entities.name: LEGUME CROPS
entities.description: Tropical legume crops in Asia whose productivity has stagnated over 30 years

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: A subset of legume crops providing essential diet components affordable to the majority

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Crops that have received preferential allocation of research resources compared to legumes

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that reduce the yields of Asian legumes to levels where harvesting is not economic

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The agricultural output of legume crops, negatively impacted by insect pests

entities.name: INSECTICIDE RESISTANCE
entities.description: A condition in key production areas making certain insect pest species uncontrollable

entities.name: INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical tools used for pest control, upon which farmers are encouraged to reduce dependence

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A long-term policy and scheme for the rational management of insect pests

entities.name: CROP LOSS INDICATORS
entities.description: Indicators used by governments to set priorities for pest management

entities.name: REGIONAL STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies for pest management developed based on crop loss indicators

entities.name: IPM CENTRE
entities.description: A proposed organization in Asia to collect and disseminate information and technology for legume production

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the legume crops and insect pests are located
